name: easylatex

metadata.name: easylatex
metadata.summary: Simplify writing LaTeX documents with Python.

documentation:
# EasyLaTex

EasyLaTex is a Python library that simplifies the process of writing LaTeX documents.

## Features
- Create LaTeX documents using Python.
- Add sections, paragraphs, and more.
- Export to `.tex` files.

## Installation
```bash
pip install easylatex

classes.name: easylatex.core.EasyLatexDocument

methods.name: easylatex.core.EasyLatexDocument.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a new LaTeX document.

Args:
    documentClass (str): The LaTeX document class (default: "article").
    options (list): List of options for the document class (e.g., ["12pt", "a4paper"]).

methods.name: easylatex.core.EasyLatexDocument.addSection
documentation: Add a section to the document.

methods.name: easylatex.core.EasyLatexDocument.addParagraph
documentation: Add a paragraph to the document.

methods.name: easylatex.core.EasyLatexDocument.exportToTex
documentation:
Export the document to a .tex file.

Args:
    filename (str): Name of the output file.

methods.name: easylatex.core.EasyLatexDocument._generateTex
documentation: Generate the complete LaTeX document as a string.
Class to represent a LaTeX document and provide methods to generate it.
